_note: Nation-level team metadata for /teams/<nation>.html pages. Captains per format sourced from current 2026 rosters; update when they change.

nations.name: India
nations.identity: The most-watched cricket team on earth. Test and ODI home fortress; T20 reigning champions (2024).

nations.name: Australia
nations.identity: WTC 2023 champions; 2023 ODI World Cup winners. Pace-and-pressure pedigree at home, learning to adapt abroad.

nations.name: England
nations.identity: Bazball-era Test side — aggressive, unorthodox, occasionally devastating. 2019 ODI and 2022 T20 World Cup winners.

nations.name: Pakistan
nations.identity: Pace-bowling factory — Shaheen, Naseem, and a rotating cast of teenage quicks. 2009 T20 WC champions.

nations.name: South Africa
nations.identity: 2024 T20 World Cup runners-up. Bouncy home conditions, Rabada leading the attack.

nations.name: New Zealand
nations.identity: 2021 WTC champions. Williamson's side plays with a quiet, methodical excellence.
